decision_rules.LEXICAL: Incorrect word choice, mistranslation of terms, or omission/addition of key lexical items.
decision_rules.SYNTACTIC: Incorrect word order, missing grammatical elements, malformed sentence structures.
decision_rules.PRAGMATIC: Inappropriate register, loss of discourse meaning, incorrect handling of context-dependent expressions.
decision_rules.CULTURAL: Loss/mistranslation of culturally embedded concepts (idioms, kinship terms, metaphors).
decision_rules.severity_minor: Meaning mostly preserved; small impact on adequacy/fluency.
decision_rules.severity_major: Noticeable meaning distortion or important info lost/added.
decision_rules.severity_critical: Meaning changes substantially; misleading or communicatively failing translation.
